# kSecAttrAccessGroupToken

**Global Variable**

The access group containing items provided by external tokens.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrAccessGroupToken: CFString
```

## Discussion

Use this access group identifier as the value for the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrAccessGroup] attribute in a keychain query to access external tokens such as smart cards. Access to this group is granted by default and does not require an explicit entry in your app’s [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/BundleResources/Entitlements/keychain-access-groups].
title: kSecAttrAccessGroupToken
